title: KanSMP End Poem
description: An edit of the end poem for the KanSMP, referencing many SMPs the players were in before!
body:
A rewrite of the End Poem for the KanSMP that references many old SMPs the members were in before!

SPOILERS: Full Poem Here! [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sKP_dT4DAL4](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sKP_dT4DAL4)
